metadata.title: Vipr2 (MGI:MGI:107166)
metadata.comment: deleted mouse model as all annotations were ISO annotations from a paper (PMID:23862016) that was subsequently retracted, see Soetedjo L, et al. Targeting of vasoactive intestinal peptide receptor 2, VPAC2, a secretin family G-protein coupled receptor, to primary cilia. Biol Open. 2014 Nov 4;3(11):1150. PMID:25369807
